# SynthBanshee — Architecture Index for LLM Agents
# High-density pointer map. Read the referenced files for full detail.

## Purpose
Synthetic Hebrew audio dataset generator for two DataHack AI safety projects:
- She-Proves: domestic violence detection on smartphones
- Elephant in the Room: social-worker attack alerting in clinic/welfare offices

## Key planning docs
- docs/spec.md                        — authoritative schema (audio, labels, metadata, IAA)
- docs/audio_generation_v3_design.md  — Implementation Tracker (all P0–P2 milestones + status)
- docs/implementation_plan.md         — phased milestones, risk register, API cost estimates
- docs/design_approaches.md           — why Config-Driven Pipeline (Approach 1) was chosen

## Entry points
- synthbanshee/cli.py                 — all Click commands (generate, generate-batch, qa-report, iaa-report)
- synthbanshee/cli.py:_run_generate_pipeline()  — orchestrates stages 1–5 for one clip
- synthbanshee/cli.py:_TYPOLOGY_INTENSITY_MAP   — (typology, intensity) → (tier1, tier2) mapping

## Core pipeline modules (in execution order)
1. synthbanshee/script/generator.py         — LLM script generation (OpenAI/Anthropic)
   synthbanshee/script/types.py             — DialogueTurn, ScriptResult
   synthbanshee/script/templates/           — Jinja2 .j2 scene templates
   synthbanshee/script/hebrew_disambiguator.py — niqqud + SSML phoneme injection (M1)

2. synthbanshee/tts/renderer.py             — TTSRenderer.render_scene() → MixedScene
   synthbanshee/tts/mixer.py                — SceneMixer.mix_sequential(); _apply_rms_gain() (M3a)
   synthbanshee/tts/azure_provider.py       — Azure Cognitive Services TTS client
   synthbanshee/tts/ssml_builder.py         — SSML construction helpers

3a. synthbanshee/augment/preprocessing.py  — preprocess(); _peak_limit() (M3b); validate_audio()
3b. synthbanshee/augment/room_sim.py       — room IR convolution (Tier B)
    synthbanshee/augment/device_profiles.py — phone / pi_budget_mic frequency response
    synthbanshee/augment/noise_mixer.py     — MUSAN noise layer
    synthbanshee/augment/types.py           — AugmentationLog (SFX timing source of truth)

4. synthbanshee/labels/generator.py        — auto-label generation from script + augmentation log
   synthbanshee/labels/schema.py           — EventLabel, ClipMetadata Pydantic models
   synthbanshee/labels/iaa.py              — per-category Cohen's kappa; IAAReport; iaa-report CLI
   synthbanshee/labels/prosody_metrics.py  — prosody metric helpers

5. synthbanshee/package/validator.py       — validate_clip() — checks all three files
   synthbanshee/package/manifest.py        — manifest CSV generation
   synthbanshee/package/qa.py             — automated QA suite; QAReport
   synthbanshee/package/splitter.py        — speaker-disjoint train/val/test splits
   synthbanshee/package/archiver.py        — dataset archive packaging
   synthbanshee/package/dataset_card.py    — HuggingFace dataset card

## Config models
- synthbanshee/config/scene_config.py      — SceneConfig (per-scene YAML schema)
- synthbanshee/config/speaker_config.py    — SpeakerConfig, StyleEntry (rms_target_dbfs), DisfluencyProfile
- synthbanshee/config/acoustic_config.py   — AcousticConfig (room + device)
- synthbanshee/config/run_config.py        — RunConfig (batch generation)
- synthbanshee/config/taxonomy.py          — taxonomy loader helpers

## Config files (YAML)
- configs/taxonomy.yaml                    — label taxonomy (source of truth for all label strings)
- configs/examples/scene_*.yaml            — worked scene examples
- configs/examples/speaker_*.yaml          — worked speaker persona examples (with rms_target_dbfs)
- configs/acoustic_scenes/                 — room + device profiles
- configs/run_configs/                     — full batch run definitions

## Key data models
- SceneConfig            → configs/scenes/*.yaml  (scene-level: typology, speakers, turns)
- SpeakerConfig          → configs/speakers/*.yaml (speaker_id, style_map, disfluency)
- StyleEntry             → speaker_config.py (rate, pitch, volume, rms_target_dbfs)
- DialogueTurn           → script/types.py (speaker_id, text_original, text_spoken, intensity, pause_before_s)
- MixedScene             → script/types.py (samples, turn_onsets_s, turn_offsets_s, speaker_ids)
- PreprocessingResult    → augment/preprocessing.py (output_path, silence_pad_applied_s, steps_applied)
- AugmentationLog        → augment/types.py (sfx_events with onset_s/offset_s)
- EventLabel             → labels/schema.py (tier1_category, tier2_subtype, onset_s, offset_s)
- ClipMetadata           → labels/schema.py (weak labels, speaker info, is_synthetic, provenance)
- RunConfig              → config/run_config.py (scenes, speakers, n_clips, output_dir, split)

## Tests
- tests/unit/test_preprocessing.py    — preprocess(), _peak_limit(), validate_audio()
- tests/unit/test_mixer.py            — SceneMixer 4-tuple API, _apply_rms_gain()
- tests/unit/test_speaker_config.py   — SpeakerConfig validation
- tests/unit/test_labels.py           — label generation
- tests/integration/                  — end-to-end clip generation tests

## Milestone status (as of 2026-04-16)
Done (P0):  M1, M2a, M3a, M3b, IAA utilities (kappa, IAAReport, iaa-report CLI)
Next (P0):  M4 — Emotional-state metadata consistency
Queued P1:  M5, M6, M7, M2b, M8a, M8b
Queued P2:  M9a, M9b, M10a, M10b, M11, M12 (gate), M13
Full tracker: docs/audio_generation_v3_design.md §Implementation Tracker
